name: gtars
description: High-performance toolkit for genomic interval analysis in Rust with Python bindings. Use when working with genomic regions, BED files, coverage tracks, overlap detection, tokenization for ML models, or fragment analysis

interface.shortDescription: High-performance toolkit for genomic interval analysis in Rust with Python bindings. Use when working with genomic regio
